task_completion.description: Log into the OpenCAD system as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or admin panel is visible, indicating a successful login as admin@opencad.local.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management or edit page for the Dispatch Officer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit User' screen or user list is open, specifically showing the account for 'Dispatch Officer' (dispatch@opencad.local).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Sheriff' department to the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the department selection area (dropdown, checkboxes, or tags), 'Sheriff' is selected or added for the Dispatch Officer.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Highway' department to the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the department selection area, 'Highway' is selected or added for the Dispatch Officer.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Communications' department remains assigned to the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the department selection area, 'Communications' is still selected or present alongside the newly added departments.
A success message (e.g., 'User updated successfully') is visible, or the user list shows the Dispatch Officer with the updated departments.

integrity.description: The agent must use the OpenCAD web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the OpenCAD application, not terminal commands (like curl or mysql) or scripts.

integrity.description: The user must be assigned to exactly three departments, no more.
integrity.visual_evidence: The department selection for the Dispatch Officer shows ONLY Communications, Sheriff, and Highway. No other departments (like Fire or EMS) are selected.

integrity.description: The agent actually modified the user settings rather than just typing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made within the actual form fields of the OpenCAD application, not in a text editor or developer console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: 'Dispatch Officer' (Email: dispatch@opencad.local). The user initially has access only to the 'Communications' department. The task requires the user to have exactly three departments: 'Communications', 'Highway', and 'Sheriff'. The agent must add 'Highway' and 'Sheriff' while ensuring 'Communications' is not removed.
